All we need from you is the editing.



Your Responsibilities



Edit 10–16 minute videos to a high-retention standard — punchy pacing, strong hooks, no dead air, constant pattern interrupts to keep viewers engaged



Source original, high-quality stock footage and AI-generated visuals relevant to sustainable homes, nature, off-grid builds, and ancient history — zero recycled, reused, or inauthentic content



Use AI tools smartly and responsibly (for visuals, enhancement, B-roll generation) — not lazy AI filler that looks cheap or gets flagged



Add smooth, cinematic transitions and motion graphics that feel dynamic and educational



Include engaging on-screen text, callouts, and lower thirds that reinforce key points



Select and layer royalty-free, non-copyrighted background music that matches the tone (calm, curious, epic where needed)



Maintain a consistent visual identity inspired by Wild Line across all videos



Deliver clean, YouTube-ready exports (1080p or 4K, correct format and specs)



You Are the Right Fit If You:



Have proven experience editing faceless documentary-style or educational YouTube videos



Deeply understand viewer retention mechanics — hooks, pacing, visual variety, and pattern interrupts



Know how to source and use footage legally and originally — no content farm recycling



Are fluent in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, After Effects, or similar professional tools



Are reliable, proactive, and quality-obsessed — this is a long-term partnership, not a one-off job



Can consistently meet deadlines



Project Details



???? Type: Long-term, ongoing contract



???? Frequency: 3–4 videos/week



?? Average video length: 10–16 minutes



???? Budget: $20 (and we will definitely gonna increase it in the future)



To Apply



Please send:



Your portfolio — links to faceless YouTube videos you have edited (required, no exceptions)



A brief note on your editing workflow for a faceless documentary-style video



Examples of work closest in style to Wild Line 



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Agent Developer
description:
Project Type: Fixed-Price Micro-Project 



Budget: Up to $8 per completed task



Overview

We are looking for automation enthusiasts, developers, and tech content creators to test out and build with our new platform. Your task will be to use our platform to create custom components, nodes, or tools for popular orchestration platforms like n8n, Dify, and others, and then share your experience with the community!



If you love tinkering with AI workflows, low-code automation, and sharing your builds online, this is a quick and easy project for you.



The Tasks & Deliverables



Base Task ($5 Fixed):

- Sign up and use our platform to create a functional component, node, or tool for an orchestration tool (e.g., n8n, Dify, etc.).

- Write a short, authentic post about your experience and the component you built on LinkedIn OR Reddit.

- Crucial Step: Your post must include clear screenshots or proof demonstrating that the component you built actually works and functions successfully within the orchestration tool.



Bonus Task (Additional $3):



- Instead of just a text/image post, record a short screen-share video showing how you used our platform to build the component.

- The video must clearly show the final component working successfully in action.

- Post this video on YouTube OR Reddit.

- (Completing this bonus brings your total payout to $8).



Requirements

- Familiarity with workflow orchestration tools like n8n, Dify, LangChain, or similar automation software.

- An active LinkedIn, Reddit, or YouTube account in good standing.

- Ability to communicate clearly and write authentic, engaging tech content.

- Ability to troubleshoot and successfully test the components you build.

- A basic understanding of APIs and node creation is a plus!



To apply, please reply with:



A brief sentence about your experience with tools like n8n or Dify.

title: High-Level Amazon Operations Manager / Personal Assistant (Supplements Brands)
description:
High-Level Amazon Operations Manager / Personal Assistant (Supplements Brands)



We are launching two new supplement brands on Amazon and are looking for a high-level Operations Manager / Personal Assistant to help build, organize, and manage all aspects of the business from the ground up.



This is not a basic VA role.

We are looking for someone who can think, organize, execute, and take ownership at a very high level.



Key Responsibilities

Operations & System Management

Build and maintain a fully organized dashboard (Notion / Airtable / similar)

Structure and manage all files, documents, and workflows

Track products, suppliers, shipments, and tasks in a clear and scalable system

Ensure everything is documented, up-to-date, and easy to access

SOP Creation & Process Control

Create detailed, step-by-step SOPs for all recurring tasks

Develop checklists and workflows to ensure consistency

Continuously improve processes and eliminate inefficiencies

Ensure all tasks are executed according to defined procedures

Amazon Case Management

Open, manage, and track cases in Seller Central

Handle different case types (FBA, listings, compliance, account issues)

Follow up persistently until resolution

Escalate cases when needed using proper logic

Maintain a structured case tracking system

Supplier Communication

Communicate with suppliers to collect accurate product and compliance information

Request and verify documents (COA, GMP, certifications, product specs, etc.)

Follow up consistently to ensure nothing is missing

Keep all communication organized and documented

Shipment & Inventory Management (Critical)

Create and manage FBA shipments

Handle products with expiration dates — understand shelf life and shipping timing

Decide when inventory should be sent to Amazon

Track shipments end-to-end and ensure accuracy

Account & Brand Support

Assist in managing multiple brands/accounts if needed

Maintain structure and organization across all operations

AI & Efficiency

Use AI tools to improve workflows and productivity

Work with tools like Claude Code and Claude CoWorker to support automation, research, and execution

Help automate repetitive processes and improve speed and accuracy

Research & Problem Solving

Research new processes and solve problems independently

Learn quickly and implement structured solutions

Turn new knowledge into SOPs and repeatable systems

Requirements

Strong experience with Amazon Seller Central (preferred)

Experience working with AI tools (Claude Code, Claude CoWorker, or similar) is required

Highly organized and process-oriented mindset

Ability to manage multiple workflows simultaneously

Strong communication skills (written and verbal)

Ability to learn quickly and work independently

Experience with tools like Notion / Airtable / ClickUp (advantage)

Critical Expectations



This role requires:



Extreme attention to detail

Double-checking every step before execution

Zero tolerance for careless mistakes



You must be someone who does not miss details and takes full responsibility for accuracy.



Important



Before applying, please answer this question:



Do you truly believe you can handle this level of responsibility, precision, and workload — including consistently double-checking your work and avoiding mistakes?



If not, this role is not the right fit.

title: Google Ads Media Buyer Who Can Hit Target CPA? We're Hiring
description:
Job Title: Media Buyer (Google Ads) — Work on High-Spend, High-Impact Campaigns

Location: Philippines — Remote 

Salary:  30,000 –  40,000 PHP / month 

Type: Full-time 

Experience: Minimum 1 year in Google Ads or paid media



About AdCeptive Media/

AdCeptive Media is a Dubai-based performance marketing company. We run paid campaigns for global eCommerce and lead generation clients — real budgets, real CPA targets, real accountability. We hire slowly, pay fairly, and give people who execute ownership of their work.



The Role:-

We need a Google Ads Media Buyer who can take a campaign brief and run with it. You will launch, manage, and optimize Search, Display, and Call-Only campaigns for lead generation clients. You will work under direct supervision following our campaign SOPs. You are not expected to independently own a new vertical from day one. You are expected to follow a framework, hit KPI targets, and flag problems before they become expensive.

If you need hand-holding on every decision, are comfortable with vague campaign briefs, or cannot explain why a CPA spiked — this role is not for you.



What You Will Do:-



• Launch and manage Google Ads campaigns across Search, Display, and Call-Only with proper structure and conversion tracking from day one

• Hit CPL and CPA targets — not just manage campaigns, but optimize them down

• Conduct keyword research, write ad copy variants, and run A/B tests on creatives, bids, and landing page hypotheses

• Set up and verify conversion tracking via Google Tag Manager, Google Analytics, and CAPI before any campaign goes live

• Submit weekly performance reports with diagnosis and next actions — not just numbers

• Identify scaling opportunities on accounts hitting targets and flag deterioration on those that aren't

• Collaborate with landing page and creative teams to improve funnel conversion rates

• Join client calls and internal reviews; communicate professionally across time zones





Must-Have Skills:-



• Minimum 1 year managing Google Ads campaigns (lead generation experience preferred)

• Solid understanding of Search campaign structure: match types, bid strategies, Quality Score, ad groups, negative keywords

• Can explain CPL, CPA, ROAS, CTR, and CPC from memory — and knows which metric matters most for which campaign type

• Hands-on experience with Google Tag Manager and Google Analytics for conversion setup

• Has run A/B tests and can explain what was tested, what happened, and why

• Strong written and spoken English

• Can work independently in a remote, async environment across time zones



Nice to Have:-

• YouTube Ads experience

• Pay-per-call campaign exposure

• Experience with call tracking tools (CallRail, WhatConverts, Redtrack,Ringba etc.)

• Basic understanding of landing page optimization and funnel structure





What We Expect in Your First 90 Days:-

Day 1: Complete tool access setup, review one campaign and submit written observations to your manager by end of day, read and sign off on our Google Ads SOP.

First 30 days: Launch at least one campaign with full conversion tracking. Deliver weekly reports with specific optimizations taken. Bring one existing campaign's CPL down by a measurable amount — or write a clear diagnosis of what's blocking it.

First 90 days: Fully own your assigned accounts with minimal check-ins. Hit or beat target CPL/CPA on at least two accounts. Submit one scaling proposal for a high-performing account. Build a testing framework for at least one account.



Our Hiring Process:-

We run a structured process. Missing any requirement at any stage is an automatic rejection — not to be harsh, but because following instructions is the core skill this role demands.



1. Application review — compliance and experience check

2. Structured survey — technical skills, work ethic, self-management (40–45 min, no AI tools)

3. Paid trial task — a real campaign audit with a written plan and a Loom walkthrough

4. Culture interview — 45 min with the Hiring Lead, including a live walkthrough of your trial

5. Founder interview — 30 min, final call and offer discussion

The trial is paid. It takes 4–8 hours of real work. You will receive a simplified version of our Google Ads SOP before you start and your plan must follow it.



HOW TO APPLY:-


 your application to: 

Subject line — exact format, no variation: FirstName-LastName-GoogleAdsMediaBuyer-Philippines (Example: Maria-Santos-GoogleAds MediaBuyer-Philippines)



Your
 must include all of the following — missing any single item = no reply:-



1. CV / résumé as a single PDF:-

2. Google Ads portfolio link or samples (live accounts, case studies, or anonymized screenshots with results)

3. A plain-text two-paragraph answer written directly in the
 body: describe the single best result you have produced in a  Google Ads campaign and exactly how you produced it

4. Your current monthly compensation in USD equivalent and your available start date

5. A photo of your workspace

6. A Speedtest.net screenshot showing minimum 25 Mbps download / 10 Mbps upload

title: Recruitment Expert
description:
# Recruitment Agent — Source High-Quality Video Talent (AI Creators & Editors)



**Hourly Rate + $100 Commission Per Successful Hire**



We're looking for a driven recruitment agent to help us find and vet top-tier video talent on an ongoing basis. You'll be paid your hourly rate plus a $100 USD bonus for every successful hire you bring us.



---



## What You'll Be Doing



You'll source, engage, and screen candidates for two types of roles, then send us only the best. We do NOT want to interview low-quality applicants — your job is to be the quality filter.



**Your responsibilities:**

- Find candidates through job boards, communities, freelance platforms, social media, and your own network

- Review their portfolios carefully against the criteria below

- Have a conversation with each candidate to confirm their skills, availability, and interest

- Submit only vetted, high-quality candidates to us with a short summary and portfolio links



---



## Role 1: AI Video Content Creator



We need creators who work with AI video generation tools and produce polished, creative output — not just raw AI dumps.



**Required:**

- Hands-on experience with Seedance, Nano Banana, or similar AI video generation tools

- Familiarity with other AI tools (Runway, Pika, Kling, Midjourney, etc.) is a plus

- Strong prompt engineering skills and ability to refine AI outputs to a high standard

- Good eye for storytelling, pacing, and visual composition



**Portfolio must show:**

- At least 3 completed AI-generated video projects

- Evidence of creative direction (not just default outputs)

- Quality refinement and iteration on AI-generated content



---



## Role 2: Professional Video Editor



We need editors who can deliver polished, professional-grade video across formats.



**Required:**

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or Avid Media Composer

- Solid skills in colour grading, audio mixing, transitions, and motion graphics

- Experience editing for social media (Reels, TikTok, Shorts) and/or long-form content

- Ability to work from briefs and hit deadlines



**Portfolio must show:**

- At least 3 professionally edited video projects

- Variety of styles or formats (social, commercial, narrative, etc.)

- Clean technique, good pacing, and polished audio/visuals



---



## Compensation



- **Hourly rate** — tell us your rate based on your experience

- **Plus $100 USD bonus per successful hire** — no cap on placements

- Bonuses paid upon candidate acceptance and confirmation

- Ongoing engagement with room to grow



---



## Do NOT Send Us



- Candidates with generic or low-effort demo reels

- Portfolios of unedited, raw AI outputs with no refinement

- Editors whose only experience is with basic tools like iMovie or CapCut

- Anyone who can't demonstrate real, hands-on use of the required tools

- Applicants who can't communicate clearly or follow a brief



---



## To Apply



Tell us:

1. A brief intro about your recruiting experience, especially in creative/video talent

2. Examples of past placements or sourcing work (if available)

3. Your preferred sourcing channels and methods

4. Your hourly rate



We're looking for agents who take quality seriously. If that's you, we'd love to work together.

title: Digital Illustrator (YouTube Content / Execution Role)
description:

Produce characters, icons, and simple diagrams for YouTube videos

Accurately follow and replicate established visual styles

Prepare layered files optimized for animation (e.g., for After Effects)

Handle revisions and iterative production tasks

Maintain consistency across all visual outputs



? Requirements

Basic experience in digital illustration

Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator and/or Photoshop

Ability to follow instructions precisely and reproduce designs accurately

Experience with simple, flat, and minimal design styles

Basic understanding of layer organization and asset separation

Basic English reading comprehension



? Ideal Candidate

Detail-oriented and able to work efficiently

Comfortable following structured guidelines and rules

Responsive to feedback and revisions

Reliable and consistent in output quality

Able to maintain steady production over time



? Employment Details

Monthly Salary: 20,000 PHP (starting rate)

Working Hours: Full-time (approx. 40 hours/week)

Location: Remote



? Performance & Compensation Review



This position starts with a base salary.

Compensation may be reviewed and adjusted based on performance and output.



Evaluation criteria include:



Production speed and ability to meet deadlines

Quality and accuracy of execution

Consistency and reliability over time



Salary adjustments and role expansion will be discussed individually based on performance.



? Expected Output (Scope & Volume)



? Monthly Production (Estimated)

Approximately 60–120 assets per month

Examples:

Simple icons: 8–15 per day

Basic characters: 3–6 per day

Simple diagrams: 2–3 per day



? Video Output Equivalent

Approx. 2–3 videos worth of assets per month



Assumes clear guidelines and structured direction are provided.



? Quality Expectations

Simple, flat-style illustrations

Limited color palette (typically 3–5 colors)

Accurate reproduction of provided styles and layouts

Properly layered files suitable for animation



? Not Required

Concept development or ideation

Complex visual design or advanced illustration

Independent creative direction



? How to Apply



Please submit the following:



Portfolio (required)

Simple illustrations and diagram work are preferred

Tools you use

Estimated daily production capacity



? Additional Notes



This is an execution-focused role, not a concept design position.



We are looking for someone who can:

Follow instructions precisely

Deliver consistent output

Work efficiently at scale

title: Virtual Assistant – Data Management & Billing Specialist
description:
Job Title: Virtual Assistant – Data Management & Billing Specialist



Susanne One Love nursing services is seeking a meticulous, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to join our team. This role is designed for a data enthusiast who can transform complex spreadsheets into streamlined, automated assets. You will be responsible for ensuring our billing is pinpoint accurate and our data workflows are built for future scalability.



Key Responsibilities

    •    Billing Oversight: Process and manage billing cycles, ensuring all figures align with service records and customer accounts.

    •    Cross-Referencing: Perform rigorous audits of data sets to identify discrepancies between booking systems, member logs, and financial records.

    •    Process Automation: Design and implement formulas, macros, or integrated workflows (e.g., Zapier, Excel Power Query) to automate repetitive data tasks and billing triggers.

    •    Reporting: Generate weekly and monthly summaries of billing status and data integrity.



Required Skills & Qualifications

    •    Language: Native or bilingual fluency in English (written and verbal) is mandatory for internal communication and audit notes.

    •    Numerical Accuracy: Exceptional attention to detail with a "zero-error" mindset when handling financial data.

    •    Technical Logic: Demonstrated ability to build automations that simplify manual entry and reduce human error.

    •    Independence: Capability to manage time-sensitive billing deadlines with minimal supervision.



Preferred Experience

    •    Previous experience in a wellness, spa, or fitness gym environment.

    •    Experience with billing reconciliation for subscription-based membership models.

    •    Familiarity with cloud-based collaboration tools and project management software.

title: Senior Backend Operations Manager (DTC E-commerce – Shopify)
description:
We are a fast-scaling DTC e-commerce brand and are looking for a **Senior Backend Operations Manager** to take full ownership of our backend operations.



This is NOT a beginner role.

This is NOT a VA role.

This is NOT a marketing role.



We are only looking for someone who has **already operated inside a real DTC Shopify brand** and has been directly responsible for backend operations.



---



THIS ROLE IS 100?CKEND OPERATIONS



This role is NOT focused on marketing, ads, or creatives.



This role is for someone with deep, hands-on experience in:



* Fulfillment operations

* Supplier management

* Order flow & logistics

* Backend systems & processes



If your background is mainly in marketing, ads, or general VA work — this role is NOT for you.



---



HARD REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Do NOT apply if you do not meet ALL of the following:



* You have worked in a **DTC Shopify e-commerce brand**

* You have been **directly responsible (owned)** backend operations

* You have managed **fulfillment, suppliers, or logistics**

* You have solved real operational problems (delays, supplier issues, shipping errors)

* You understand the full order flow: **purchase ? fulfillment ? delivery**

* You have built or improved **SOPs, workflows, or backend systems**

* You have worked in a business doing **at least $300k/month** (preferably higher)

* You have experience coordinating **teams, agencies, or multiple moving parts**



If you have not owned backend operations — your application will be ignored.



---



YOUR RESPONSIBILITY



You are not supporting operations — you are owning them.



You will take full ownership over:



* Order fulfillment & tracking flow

* Supplier communication & issue resolution

* Supply chain coordination

* Product listing operations

* Customer support coordination (agency)

* Internal team execution & follow-up

* Building and improving systems (SOPs, workflows, structure)



Your core objective:

mbers execute without constant follow-up

title: Full-Cycle Remote Sales Closer — Must Close Deals, Not Book Calls
description:
We are hiring a real full-cycle sales closer for a remote U.S.-market B2B role.



This is a U.S.-market sales role focused on selling services to U.S.-based local service businesses, so you must be comfortable speaking with American business owners and selling into the U.S. market.



This is not an appointment setter position.

This is not a lead generator position.

This is not a VA or customer support role.



We are specifically looking for someone who can take a prospect from outreach and first conversation all the way to a closed deal.



You must be comfortable owning the sales process, including:



* building a prospect list from scratch

* contacting and qualifying prospects

* running sales conversations

* handling objections

* following up until decision

* and closing deals



If your background is appointment setting, lead generation, customer support, admin, or booking meetings for someone else to close, this role is not the right fit.



What you will do



* build and manage your own prospect list based on our targeting direction

* contact potential clients

* qualify real opportunities

* run sales conversations

* handle objections confidently

* follow up consistently

* move qualified prospects toward decision

* close deals

* keep the pipeline and notes updated properly

* submit accurate handoff information once a deal is closed



Who we want



* real B2B sales closing experience

* strong spoken and written English

* confidence on calls

* ability to control a conversation without sounding pushy or desperate

* ability to understand a service offer and sell it clearly

* organized, reliable, and results-driven

* experience closing service-based offers is required



Do not apply if your background is



* appointment setting

* lead generation

* customer support

* admin / VA work

* booking meetings for someone else to close



We are looking for someone who has been directly responsible for closed business, not someone who only created activity before the close.



Compensation



* paid trial first

* then base + commission for the right closer

* exact structure discussed with shortlisted candidates based on actual fit and closing ability



When applying, briefly answer



Note: Please answer all application questions clearly and completely. Incomplete or vague answers will be treated negatively.



1. What sales deals have you personally closed, and were they mainly B2B or B2C?

2. Did you personally run the sales call from conversation to close?

3. What kind of service-based offers have you closed before?

4. Do you have experience selling to U.S.-based businesses or working in the U.S. market? If yes, explain briefly.

5. What is the difference between an appointment setter and a closer?

6. Are you comfortable being judged by real sales conversations and closed results?

description:

Hey, I am JT! I am looking for 1-2 hard working appointment setters for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for help doing outbound B2B cold calling for me.



I help small businesses with an A.I. Receptionist to answer their missed calls and after-hours calls. This is a simple, in-demand offer. I just need help introducing it and getting business owners interested.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads, leads are not provided.

-- Call 60-80 new contacts per 4-hour shift.

-- Offer them a free consultation to learn about A.I.

-- If they show interest, schedule them for a consultation with me

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment, I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- Clear and confident English communication with no heavy accent.

-- You are someone who is money hungry and motivated to hit your targets.

-- You are reliable with consistent attendance.



HOURS:

-- Part time (20 hours) to start, with the option for full time after 30 days.

-- Monday - Friday 10AM-2PM Pacific Standard Time (Tuesday - Saturday 1AM-5AM Philippine Time).



PAYMENT:

-- $4/hour base

-- $20 each qualified appointment that shows up

-- $150 each person who signs up for our services

-- Monthly bonuses



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B.

-- Put "Dial And Smile" as your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application. Please use your own words, and do not use chat GPT or similar:



1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling business to business and appointment setting (ONLY put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):



2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed with this response and clear what you were offering):



3) How many calls per day did you average:



4) How many appointments per week did you average:



5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:

7) You call a business and a receptionist answers. They ask, “What is this regarding?”

What do you say to get through to the owner?

(Keep your answer to 1–2 sentences max and write it exactly how you would say it on a real call):



8) What makes you better than other cold callers applying for this role:

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:
THIS IS NOT A BASIC EDITING JOB.

We run two pet content brands — Chic Kitty (cats, 42,
 Group members) and Shaggy Chic (dogs, 9,200 members) — across
 and Instagram. We produce character-driven short-form content built around real animals with distinct personalities. Hugo is chaos. Selina is editorial luxury. Every video is 8–15 seconds. Either every hook lands in the first 1.5–3 seconds, or the video fails.

This is an ongoing monthly role, not gig work. Every deliverable comes with a recipe card, character guide, and approved content bank. You are not inventing — you are executing a precise system. Familiarity with our brands and system will make every month faster than the last.

WHAT YOU PRODUCE EACH MONTH

CHIC KITTY (cats):

— 30 short-form videos (8–15 seconds, 9:16 vertical, Reels-ready)

— 10 carousels (5–7 slides, 1:1 and 4:5 formats)

— 5–8 Story video clips with thumbnails

— Thumbnails for every Reel and carousel (1280×720px, JPG)

Footage source: Raw footage delivered via Google Drive from our Thursday film sessions.

SHAGGY CHIC (dogs):

— 30 short-form videos (8–15 seconds, 9:16 vertical, Reels-ready)

— 10 carousels (5–7 slides, 1:1 and 4:5 formats)

— 5–8 Story video clips with thumbnails

— Thumbnails for every Reel and carousel (1280×720px, JPG)

Footage source: You source commercially licensed HD dog footage. Storyblocks is the required platform — an active Storyblocks subscription is a condition of this role. Sourcing guidelines and approved search criteria provided on Day 1.

TOTAL MONTHLY OUTPUT: 60 Reels + 20 carousels + 10–16 Story clips + all thumbnails.

TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

HOOK

Cold open. No intro. No logo. No fade. The most arresting frame is frame one. You have a maximum of 1.5–3 seconds. If the hook does not stop the scroll, the video has failed regardless of what follows.

AUDIO — NON-NEGOTIABLE

Trending Instagram audio is the baseline. You research trending sounds weekly — 30 minutes minimum, cross-referencing Instagram Reels and CapCut trending audio. If a sound is climbing across multiple high-performing pet videos, that is your priority pick. ASMR audio layering is required on specified videos. No elevator music. No generic royalty-free filler. No old lady tracks. No sounds with zero 
ntum on the platform. Music is a critical component of this role — editors who fall short here are not the right fit.

COLOR AND AESTHETIC

Cool and vibrant. Editorial and modern. Never warm. Never golden hour. Never domestic amber tones. Clean whites, cool-toned neutrals, saturated natural color. Warm grading is an automatic fail. If your portfolio skews warm — this is not the right aesthetic fit.

PACING

Every cut is intentional. Audio and visual cuts sync on the beat or a sound cue. ASMR elements are layered with precision — immersive, not jarring, not buried. 8–15 seconds is a precision instrument.

EXPORT

CapCut Pro is mandatory for final export on every video so Instagram-licensed audio embeds natively. You may rough cut in any NLE. No TikTok watermarks. No unlicensed audio. No third-party branding on any final file.

CAPTIONS

Auto-captions corrected manually on every video. Font, size, and placement follow the recipe card. Captions never cover the subject's face or key visual element.

CAROUSELS

Layout design only using the brand template provided. All text comes from the approved content bank — you are not writing copy. Deliver finished frames as individual PNGs and a combined export to Google Drive.

DELIVERY

48-hour turnaround on every batch. Hard requirement, not a target. Files delivered to Google Drive with correct naming convention. Nothing delivered with watermarks or incorrect format.

WEEKLY TREND REPORT

Every Monday: 3-bullet note to the OBM. What audio is trending this week. What performed well in the pet niche. One recommendation for the coming week's content. Five minutes to write.

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

— Portfolio including pet or animal content with strong retention, character-driven short-form under 20 seconds, ASMR-style edits, and carousel design

— CapCut Pro expert level — audio library, auto-caption tool, keyframe system, and export settings completely fluent

— Active Storyblocks subscription or willingness to obtain one before start date

— Understands hook mechanics, pattern interrupts, audio sync, and visual contrast technically — not vaguely

— 48-hour delivery discipline. Every time.

— Clear written communication. One message with full context, not multiple pings.

TEST TASK

We will send you a raw footage clip of a Minskin cat and a carousel brief.

Deliverable 1: An 8–12 second Reel. Hook in first 2 seconds. ASMR audio layer under a trending track. Clean corrected captions. No watermarks. Delivered as MP4 via Google Drive link.

Deliverable 2: A 5-slide carousel using stills we provide. Brand palette and approved copy included — layout only.

Turnaround: 48 hours from receipt of footage.

title: Web Developer / Support Engineer
description:
## About the Role



We're looking for a dedicated, full-time Web Developer and Support Engineer to join our team on a long-term basis. You'll build, maintain, and support our WordPress websites and platforms — from crafting custom theme functionality to managing the cloud infrastructure that keeps everything running. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys both writing code and solving problems, and who's comfortable switching between development work and hands-on customer support. You don't need to know everything on day one — we provide paid training and have senior technicians on hand to help you grow into the role.



## Position Details



- **Type:** Full-time, long-term position

- **Hours:** Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT)

- **Salary:** ~$1,500 USD/month

- **Location:** Remote — must be available to work during Australian business hours

- **Requirements:** Willingness to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) and Non-Compete Agreement

- **Leave:** Australian public holidays off, plus leave over Easter and Christmas/New Year periods

- **Training:** Paid training provided to get you up to speed where there are knowledge gaps

- **Support:** You'll be backed by senior technicians who are available to guide, mentor, and support you



## Responsibilities



- Develop and maintain WordPress sites, including custom theme modifications, plugin configuration, and performance optimisation.

- Build and manage page layouts and content structures using Elementor and Advanced Custom Fields (ACF).

- Configure and support LearnDash-powered learning environments, including course setup, user management, and troubleshooting.

- Write custom PHP functions to extend WordPress themes and plugin behaviour as needed.

- Manage and monitor hosting infrastructure on Amazon EC2, including instance configuration and scaling.

- Configure and maintain Amazon Elastic Load Balancers to ensure high availability and reliable traffic distribution.

- Respond to support requests, diagnose issues, and implement fixes across the web stack.

- Communicate directly with clients via phone and
 — explaining technical issues clearly, providing updates, and guiding customers through solutions.

- Document technical processes, configurations, and solutions for the team's knowledge base.



## Required Skills & Experience



- **Exceptional written and spoken English** — you will be communicating directly with Australian clients via phone and
, so clear, professional, and confident English is essential.

- Solid working knowledge of **PHP** in the context of WordPress development.

- Experience building and customising sites with **WordPress**, including theme and plugin development.

- Proficiency with **Elementor** page builder for layout creation and management, using Hello Elementor as a theme base.

- Hands-on experience writing custom functions for **WordPress theme modifications** (functions.php, child themes, hooks, and filters).

- Familiarity with **Advanced Custom Fields (ACF)** for building flexible content structures.

- Experience with **Amazon EC2** instance management and **Elastic Load Balancing**.

- Comfortable performing **basic Linux troubleshooting** via the command line (SSH, log files, file permissions, service management).

- Willingness to receive and make phone calls to assist customers directly.

- Willingness to sign an NDA and Non-Compete Agreement.



## Nice to Have



- Experience with **Cloudflare** — particularly security configuration, DNS management, and Cloudflare Stream.

- Experience with **LearnDash** LMS configuration, course building, and user management.

- Familiarity with other AWS services (RDS, S3, CloudFront, Route 53).

- Understanding of web security best practices (SSL, firewalls, WordPress hardening).

- Familiarity with caching strategies (object caching, CDN configuration, page caching plugins).

- Experience with site migration and DNS management.



## What We Value



- A problem-solving mindset — you're resourceful and enjoy figuring things out.

- Clear, confident communication — you're comfortable picking up the phone and talking a client through an issue.

- A willingness to learn new tools and technologies as the role evolves.

- Ownership and reliability — you follow through and keep things running smoothly.

- Long-term commitment — we're looking to build a lasting working relationship, not fill a short-term gap.

title: WordPress Landing Page Builder
description:
We are a small UK-based digital marketing agency looking for a skilled WordPress developer/designer to help us build high-converting landing pages for our clients’ PPC campaigns.



Your main responsibility will be turning a client’s existing website (or available online presence) into a focused, conversion-driven landing page for use in Google Ads and Meta campaigns.



A key part of this role is writing landing page copy. You can use AI to assist, but you must first understand the client’s services to ensure the messaging is accurate, relevant, and tailored to their business.



All landing pages are built on WordPress using a block editor theme no coding required. We already have a proven structure and template in place - your job is to gather the most important information from the client’s website, Google Business profile, and social media, then use it to create a high-performing landing page. In some cases, clients won’t have an existing website, so you’ll need to build the page from scratch.



This is a fully remote, project-based role, paid at $10 per hour. A typical landing page takes between 1-5 hours to complete, depending on the industry and whether we already have a suitable template for that niche.



While this is project-based work, we’re looking to build a long-term relationship with someone who can consistently support us with landing pages and other website tasks for our clients.



To apply, please provide the following:

1. A brief explanation of why you’re a strong fit for this role

2. Links to three landing pages you’ve recently built



Successful candidates will be invited to a Google Meet interview. If successful in the interview, you will be asked to build a demo landing page to test your Wordpress and copy writing skills.

title: 3D Car Modeler (Blender) — Grassroots Indie Racing Game
description:
About the Project



Grassroots Legends is an indie simcade racing game in active development, featuring 80s and 90s period vehicles across multiple disciplines (dirt track, rally, rallycross, road, and arena racing). Think beat-up everyday cars from that era, lightly prepped and sent wheel-to-wheel. The vibe is authentic grassroots motorsport, not polished GT cars.



The Role

We're looking for a part-time Blender artist to help optimize existing car models and contribute to the vehicle lineup. You'll be working closely with the creative director on a game that values authenticity. Knowing your Commodores from your Corollas, and basic motorsport understanding is highly valued.



What You'll Be Doing



Optimizing existing vehicle meshes (polygon reduction, LODs, UV cleanup) for game-engine performance

Maintaining visual accuracy on 80s/90s period cars across multiple racing disciplines

Communicating clearly with the creative director through revision rounds (English via discord or whatsapp)



What We're Looking For



Solid Blender skills with a vehicle modeling portfolio — show us real car work

Knowledge of 80s/90s cars valued, familiarity with grassroots/budget motorsport (dirt oval, rally, demo derby, etc.)

Understanding of real-time optimization: LODs, poly budgets, clean topology

Self-directed and reliable: This is a small indie project and we need people who take ownership



Nice to Have

Experience working on racing games or vehicle mods

Interior / cockpit design skills

PBR texturing skills



How to Apply

Send us: 

(1) a portfolio link with your best vehicle work, 

(2) background / interest in motorsport / cars, if any

(3) your expected hourly rate or typical rates per vehicle / optimization.



No portfolio = no consideration.

title: Children’s Book Illustrator (Vintage English Inspired Style)
description:
I’m looking for a talented illustrator to bring an English short children’s chapter book to life through soft, nostalgic illustrations.



The style I’m after is classic vintage English children’s book illustration, inspired by Beatrix Potter and the gentle, detailed world of Sylvanian Families children's toys. Think: soft watercolour tones, warm countryside charm, expressive animals, old English vintage clothes, and a timeless storybook feel.



This is inspired by those aesthetics, not a copy of them, so originality within that world is very important.



Project Details



8 illustrations in total



Includes 1 front cover illustration (full colour)



A mix of full-page story scenes and key narrative illustrations



Focus on animals (rabbits are especially important for this project)



Scenes should feel warm, detailed, and emotionally story-driven rather than cartoon-like



Style Direction



Beatrix Potter-inspired vintage English illustration style



Gentle, natural, watercolour-like finish



Soft storytelling imagery (cottage gardens, woodland settings, cosy interiors, countryside life)



Aesthetic influence: Beatrix Potter + Sylvanian Families-style charm and detail



Important:



No AI-generated artwork



All illustrations must be original, hand-created work (digital or traditional is fine as long as it is fully original)



What I’m Looking For



Strong portfolio in traditional or semi-traditional illustration styles



Excellent ability to draw animals with expression and character



Experience creating storybook-style scenes with atmosphere and detail



Ability to maintain a consistent style across multiple illustrations



Someone who understands gentle, nostalgic storytelling through imagery



Application



If you’re interested, please apply with examples of your work.



I would especially love to see:



Vintage / classic illustration style pieces



Animal illustrations (particularly rabbits and frogs)



Storytelling-focused artwork or children’s book samples



Please also confirm that your portfolio contains original non-AI artwork only.



Payment & Process



Payment will be made per illustration, released upon completion of each piece so we can work collaboratively throughout the project.



Credit



Full illustration credit will be given in the published book, with your name listed as the illustrator.



Future Work



This project may lead to ongoing collaboration on future children’s books and illustration projects for the right artist.



I’m a kind, respectful, and professional client, and I’m genuinely excited to find an illustrator who can bring this story to life!



Looking forward to seeing your work! Will respond to applications mid next week

title: Military Content Scriptwriter & Footage Researcher - Short Form & Long Form Video
description:
US focused military content page with 2.4 million followers on
. We publish short form video reels daily and are expanding into long form documentary content covering military operations, weapons systems, equipment, and history. All footage is sourced from public domain military archives. We need a dedicated scriptwriter and footage researcher to own the quality and retention of everything we produce.



Footage Sourcing



Search public domain military archives daily for the strongest video candidates across short form and long form formats

Assess each candidate for hook potential, visual variety, and story arc before recommending it

Deliver footage links to the editor with a one-line brief explaining the strongest angle and why it will perform

Stay ahead of the content calendar — footage must be identified the evening before production begins

Build a running library of strong footage organised by category — vehicles, aviation, naval, special operations, interdictions, historical



Short Form Scriptwriting



Write three to five short form VO scripts per day for reels between thirty and sixty seconds

Apply a structured story framework to every script without exception — strong hook, open loop, midway hook at fifteen to twenty seconds, and a payoff that rewards patience

Format all scripts for ElevenLabs AI voiceover — two to three words per line, numbers as words, specific safe language substitutions applied throughout

Deliver finished scripts with hook identified, midway hook timecoded, payoff marked, stat card suggestions included, and ElevenLabs pacing notes for the voice artist



Long Form Scriptwriting



Write 4-5 long form documentary scripts per week between three and ten minutes in length

Structure each script around a full narrative arc — origin, conflict, escalation, resolution, legacy

Layer facts and human stakes together — long form content must feel like a documentary, not a Wikipedia article read aloud

Identify the strongest retention spikes within the long form structure and engineer deliberate hooks at the two minute, four minute, and six minute marks to prevent drop-off

Deliver long form scripts with full timecode guidance, section headers for the editor, and music energy notes throughout



Editor Collaboration



Work directly with the editor daily via Slack — scripts and footage delivered together so he has everything he needs without chasing

Review rough cuts and flag any VO timing mismatches before final export

Suggest stat card text, music energy notes, and visual pacing guidance alongside every script

Be available during editing hours to answer questions and turn around quick revisions fast



Retention Ownership



Track retention performance on every published piece of content

Identify which hook formulas, story spines, and VO styles are driving the highest watch time

Bring weekly retention data into your scripting decisions — what worked last week should inform what you write this week

Flag underperforming content patterns and propose structural fixes

title: Technical Operations Specialist (GHL & Digital Assets)
description:
Systems-Focused GHL Specialist for Boutique Marketing Agency



About the Role:

We are a specialized growth agency looking for a self-reliant, tech-forward GHL Specialist to serve as our technical partner. We are currently in a "Strategic Build" phase and are seeking a long-term collaborator to architect, document, and refine our proprietary systems as we move toward full-scale operations.



The Partnership Path:

- Phase 1 (Trial/Build): Project-based work to establish core "Elite" workflows, high-logic pipelines, and landing page templates.

- Phase 2 (Growth): Regular weekly touch-base meetings as we onboard initial clients and monitor system health. *Part Time

- Phase 3 (Scale): Ongoing technical management, data analysis, and system optimization. *Possibility to add hours or shift to Full Time



Key Responsibilities:

- GHL Architecture: Build, audit, and manage sub-account Snapshots, including nested if/else workflows, complex pipelines, and multi-step custom forms.

- Web & Landing Pages: Build high-converting landing pages and agency sites directly within the GHL funnel builder.

- Technical Logistics: Manage A2P 10DLC registrations, domain integrations, and administrative access protocols.

- Fulfillment Support: Assist with Google Business Profile (GBP) management and technical administrative setups.

- Reporting & Data Analysis: Weekly extraction of KPIs from GHL and PPC dashboards. You will prepare data summaries (lead volume, tier-ranking, and cost-per-lead) to assist the founder in client reporting.

- The System Log: Maintain a detailed, client-by-client technical log (SOP) documenting every automation, tagging logic, and pipeline structure. You must be able to explain the logic behind every build.

- System Optimization: Proactively suggest GHL features or third-party integrations (Zapier, etc.) that could improve client ROI.



Bonus Skills:

- Experience or familiarity with white-label Google Ads management or major white-label PPC providers.



Who You Are:

- Tech-Forward: You stay updated on the latest GHL BETA releases and use modern integrations.

- Self-Reliant: You take ownership of a task from start to finish and solve problems proactively.

- Articulate: You can explain complex logic clearly and concisely in plain English.

- Positive & Professional: You enjoy building systems from the ground up and value long-term partnership.



To Apply:

Please provide a brief video (Loom, Zoom, or similar) or a detailed screen-share presentation showing:

1. A complex GHL workflow or landing page you have built (specifically showing if/else logic).

2. An example of how you document your technical work/SOPs for a founder or client.

3. Your favorite tech integration or GHL feature that most people overlook.

4. A bit about you and why we should work together!

title: Credit Repair Expert
description:
Virginia Credit Repair is looking for an experienced Credit Dispute Specialist to join our team on a contract basis. We are seeking a motivated and detail oriented individual who understands the credit repair industry and can effectively manage disputes, client communication, and credit reporting processes.



The ideal candidate will be responsible for processing, resolving, and responding to customer disputes related to credit bureau reporting while maintaining excellent customer service and communication throughout the process. This role requires working directly with all 3 major credit bureaus, handling client updates, and maintaining accurate documentation within our systems.



Preference will be given to candidates who already have an established team in place and are capable of handling a consistent workload efficiently.



Responsibilities:



Process and manage credit disputes through all 3 credit bureaus



Draft and submit dispute letters and supporting documentation



Respond to client messages and provide regular updates regarding account progress



Handle customer service communication professionally and promptly



Review credit reports and analyze credit bureau reporting accuracy



Maintain accurate records within Credit Repair Cloud and internal systems



Enter and update data within dispute tracking databases



Work across spreadsheets, CRM systems, and additional internal platforms



Ensure all documentation and compliance procedures are properly maintained



Requirements:



Proficient in Credit Repair Cloud



Minimum 2 years of credit repair or dispute processing experience



Strong understanding of credit reporting and dispute procedures



Excellent customer service and communication skills



Ability to manage client follow ups and account updates consistently



Highly organized with strong documentation skills



Willing to work Eastern / US business hours (9 AM to 5 PM)



Self motivated and willing to go the extra mile



Preferred Qualifications:



Existing dispute processing team or operational support staff already established



Experience managing high client volume efficiently



Experience with CRM systems and workflow management

title: English Teacher
description:
Job Title: Online English Teacher — Group & Private Classes (Full or Part-Time)



Company: My Planet English

Location: Remote (Work from home)

Schedule: Weekdays / Weekends / Both — your choice

Pay: $3–$5/hr depending on class type | Up to $500+/month if doing both



---



ABOUT US



My Planet English is a live online English learning platform with adult students worldwide — 3 live group classes and 1 private session every week. We are building our founding team of teachers right now and want people who are serious, reliable, and love teaching.



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



We have two teaching streams and you can apply for one or both:



STREAM A — Weekday Group Classes (Monday to Friday)

- 3 group classes per day, 45 minutes each

- Up to 7 students per class

- 3 hours of teaching per day

- Pay: $4.50/hr

- Monthly earnings: ~$270–$300/month



STREAM B — Weekend Private Classes (Saturday and Sunday)

- 10 private 1:1 sessions per day, 30 minutes each

- One student per session

- 5 hours of teaching per day

- Pay: $2.50 per session

- Monthly earnings: ~$200/month



DO BOTH AND EARN MORE

If you are available on both weekdays and weekends, you can take on both streams and earn $470–$500+/month working from home.



---



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES



- Deliver live English classes via our online platform (group or private depending on your stream)

- Follow our curriculum guide and adapt your style to the student level

- Keep sessions engaging, structured, and professional

- Be punctual — our students book in advance and depend on you

- Track basic notes on student progress for continuity



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- Native or near-native English speaker

- Experience teaching English online or in person (any level considered)

- TESOL, TEFL, or CELTA certification is a plus but not required

- Stable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps)

- Quiet, professional workspace

- Good quality headset and camera

- Warm, energetic, and reliable.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please send your application with the following.



1. A short introduction about your teaching background

2. Which stream you are applying for — Weekday, Weekend, or Both



We are hiring. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted within 48 hours.

Understanding of credit scoring models

[Choose one: Hourly / Per Client / Salary + Bonus]

We are a compliance-focused company. Any illegal or unethical tactics (e.g., CPNs, false disputes) will result in immediate termination.

title: ONLINE NURSING INSTRUCTOR
description:
JOB POST FOR THE ONLINE NURSING INSTRUCTOR



At Heritage Career Institute, we are dedicated to advancing healthcare education and preparing the next generation of nursing professionals. Our commitment to academic excellence, innovative teaching methods, and hands-on learning experiences sets the foundation for our students to excel in their nursing careers. 



The ONLINE NURSING INSTRUCTOR for the Practical Nursing Course plays an essential role in delivering structured, high-quality online instruction to PN students. The instructor ensures that students gain the foundational knowledge required for nursing practice while maintaining academic standards and compliance with state and institutional requirements. The instructor will utilize FA Davis, Elsevier, and Populi LMS to deliver lessons, assessments, and student support.



This is a part-time position that requires up to 10 hours per week, depending on the management approval and teaching load. Your permanent Shift will be during the Eastern Standard Time.



Position Summary:



Position:  Online Nursing Instructor

Initial Employment Status: Probationary, Part-Time

Reporting To: Program Director (PN)

Start Date: 1 week after signing the Offer Letter

Work Schedule: Eastern Standard Time (EST) 

Rendering Hours: up to 10 hours per week (depending on the management approval)

Compensation: 175 to 250 pesos per hour (Estimated)



Responsibilities of Online Nursing Instructor

The Online Nursing Instructor for the Practical Nursing Program at Heritage Career Institute plays an essential role in delivering high-quality online education using FA Davis, Elsevier, and LMS Populi. This role is responsible for teaching PN coursework in a fully virtual environment, facilitating student learning through structured online modules, and ensuring that all instructional content aligns with curriculum and accreditation standards. The Instructor manages online lectures, coursework, assessments, grading timelines, and student academic support while maintaining accurate records within Populi. This includes guiding students through digital resources, monitoring participation, identifying at-risk learners, and providing timely feedback to promote academic success. The Instructor also collaborates with the Program Director to maintain course consistency, improve instructional materials, and support audit and compliance requirements through proper documentation. 



This Job Description will be outlined in detail for you to further understand your role.





ONLINE NURSING INSTRUCTOR

Reports to: Program Director

Collaborates with: Operations, Admissions and Registrar

Primary Focus: Online Delivery of Instruction, Academic Part ONLY

Key Responsibilities:

Online Instruction & Course Management: 

Teach Practical Nursing (PN) subjects through fully online instruction using FA Davis, Elsevier, and LMS Populi Facilitate virtual lectures, discussions, and interactive learning activities aligned with PN curriculum standards 

Upload, organize course materials follow institutional and accreditation guidelines

Provide clear, constructive, and timely feedback to support student learning and progression Maintain active online engagement and consistent communication with students throughout the course 

Student Support & Engagement: 

Assist PN students in understanding course concepts and navigating online resources 

Respond promptly to student inquiries via

 Monitor academic progress, attendance, and participation to identify at-risk students 



Compliance & Documentation: 

Maintain complete and updated gradebooks, attendance logs, and academic records in LMS Populi Ensure instructional activities meet state, institutional, and accreditation requirements

 Submit syllabi, lesson plans, and assessment documentation for audits and program review 

Adhere to FERPA guidelines and maintain confidentiality of all student information

Participate in mandatory virtual meetings, orientation sessions, and required training 

Collaboration & Continuous Improvement: 

Coordinate with the Program Director to update teaching materials, curriculum alignment, and lesson plans 

Support curriculum enhancement and assist in integrating improved instructional approaches 

Participate in faculty development, evaluations, and continuing education 

Provide input to improve online teaching delivery, student experience, and overall program quality



Qualifications:

Must be a Registered Nurse (RN) with an active, unencumbered Florida RN license (passed the NCLEX-FL)

Minimum of 2 years clinical experience in nursing

Prior teaching or preceptorship experience is highly preferred

Familiarity with FA Davis, Elsevier, and LMS Populi or similar learning platforms

Strong knowledge of Practical Nursing curriculum and current nursing practices

Excellent communication skills with the ability to teach, and support students in an online setting

Strong technical proficiency in managing virtual classrooms, and navigating digital content

Ability to provide timely feedback, manage deadlines, and maintain accurate academic records

Detail-oriented, and able to work independently in a remote teaching environment

Must demonstrate professionalism, accountability, and adherence to academic standards

Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and general administrative tools. 

Ability to work with minimal supervision and maintain confidentiality.

Ability to work during AM EST hours without any conflicting schedule 

Must NOT engage in any other employment, consulting, or business activity (whether full-time or part-time) that may create a conflict of interest with the Institution. 

Knowledge about Monday.com or Click-up Application is a plus!



Requirements:

Submit a copy of your resume to 

Please make sure that you have read the Position Summary. 

No counter offers will be accepted.

Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted for an interview.

You are required to fill out this application form:

title: Remote Highlights Editor (Football)
description:
Overview

Sportway New Zealand works with sports organisations across New Zealand to deliver live match

streaming and digital content.

We are looking for football-focused individuals based in the Philippines to remotely create match

highlights from recorded games. This role plays an important part in delivering engaging video

content to teams, leagues, and fans.



Role Description

Football Highlights Editors are responsible for identifying and clipping key highlights from football

matches while they are being broadcast live or shortly after completion. This work supports

Sportway’s digital content, social media, team, club and fan engagement outputs.

Highlight clipping typically includes identifying moments such as:

• Goals

• Shots on target

• Key saves

• Penalty incidents

• Red and yellow cards

• Other relevant highlights



Editors will be provided with:

• Access to Sportway’s clipping and production platform

• Training on the highlight clipping workflow

• Ongoing support from Sportway’s operations team



Key Requirements

Applicants should meet the following criteria:

• Strong understanding of football

• Ability to accurately recognise and clip key match moments

• Reliable internet connection

• Comfortable working with computer-based platforms

• Good attention to detail

• Ability to work during New Zealand match times



Availability

Most matches take place on Saturdays and Sundays (Philippine time) during the New Zealand

football season (March – December).

Editors should be available for several hours during match windows when required.



Compensation

Successful Highlights Editors will be paid 800 PHP per match for highlight clipping duties.

Most matches take place on weekends (Philippine time), with match assignments and schedules

communicated in advance. Training on Sportway’s clipping platform will be provided before work

begins.



Location

This is a remote role. Editors can work from home or any suitable location with a stable internet

connection.

Sportway already operates a support and monitoring team based in Cebu who assist with

operations.



About Sportway

Sportway is a sports technology and broadcast company working with numerous sporting

organisations across New Zealand. Our platform provides live match streaming, performance

analysis tools, and digital content for sporting communities.



Expressions of Interest

Individuals who are interested in this opportunity are invited to submit a short Expression of Interest

outlining the following:

• Your background and involvement in football (e.g. player, coach, referee, analyst, content

creator, supporter, etc.)

• A brief summary of your experience with the sport

• Why you believe you would be well suited to the Football Highlights Editor role

• Confirmation of your availability on Weekends (Philippine time) during the New Zealand

football season



Expressions of Interest should be sent via
 to:

Mike Craig, JM Liao




: 

sportway



Shortlisted candidates may be invited to complete a short clipping test and onboarding session

with the Sportway team.

title: 3CX VOIP Engineer
description:

title: IT Project Engineer Specialist
description:
Job Posting: IT Project Engineer Specialist

Location: Work from Home (Remote)

Shift: Monday to Friday, 8am-5pm Pacific Standard Time (PST), US

About Us:

We are a leading Managed IT Service Provider based in Portland, Oregon. We pride ourselves on delivering efficient and professional IT support to our clients. As we continue to grow, we are looking to expand our team with dedicated and enthusiastic IT professionals.



Job Description:

 We are seeking a Project Engineer Specialist to oversee and coordinate IT projects, ensuring timely and budget-friendly completion. This role involves collaborating with teams, conducting feasibility studies, and providing technical support.



Responsibilities:

 Your duties as a Project Engineer Specialist will include, but are not limited to:

 * Overseeing engineering projects and ensuring they are completed on time and within budget.

 * Coordinating with various departments and stakeholders to ensure project requirements are met.

title: IT Systems Administrator (Part-Time with Growth Potential)
description:
Are you passionate about IT and looking to grow with a team that truly values your skills? We’re a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) that works closely with small businesses to provide them with top-notch IT solutions. Our goal is simple: help our clients succeed with smooth, reliable technology support.

We’re excited to bring on an IT Systems and Projects Administrator who’s eager to make a real impact by managing networks, firewalls, desktops, servers and projects for our fantastic clients. This is an opportunity with huge potential for growth. Start part-time, and as you grow with us, there’s the possibility of moving into a full-time role. If you’re looking for flexibility, some evening and weekend work may also be available.

What You’ll Be Doing:

Managing client networks, firewalls, desktops, servers, and overseeing IT projects.

Troubleshooting technical issues and keeping systems running smoothly.

Implementing best practices for security and data protection.

Collaborating directly with small business clients to provide exceptional IT support.

Leading and contributing to IT projects that drive efficiency and improvement.

Who We’re Looking For:

If you’ve got experience in any of the following areas, we’d love to hear from you!

Operating Systems: Windows 10-11, MacOS, Windows Server

Virtualization: HyperV Server

Cloud Platforms: Azure, AWS

Firewalls: Cato, Sophos, Sonicwall

Backup and Disaster Recovery: Acronis, Axcient BCDR

Networking: Ubiquiti Unifi, DNS, DHCP, VPN

Antivirus: Bitdefender, Sophos, SentinelOne

Bonus Points: Project management experience is highly valued!

Why Join Us?

Room for Growth: Start part-time and grow into a full-time role as your responsibilities expand.

Flexibility: Evening and weekend work is available to fit your schedule.

Supportive Team: Join a US-based IT team that’s here to help you grow and succeed.

Ready to Apply? Here’s How!

We want to get to know you! Along with your resume, send us a brief video introduction. We love seeing the person behind the skills! Tell us about your IT background, experience, and your availability. We’ll give extra attention to applications with a video introduction.

Send your resume and video intro to 
 excited to meet you!

title: SEO EXPERT
description:
SEO Growth Lead (Not a Beginner Role)



We’re looking for a **serious SEO operator** to take full control of our organic growth.



This is not a “write a few blogs” role.

This is **build, scale, dominate rankings, and drive revenue.**



We already have:



* 50+ live blogs

* Multiple domains across different niches

* A foundation in place



Now we need someone who can **turn this into a traffic + lead machine.**



---



## ???? What You’ll Be Responsible For



### 1. Authority Building (Backlinks That Actually Move Rankings)



* Build **high-quality, white-hat backlinks**

* Secure real placements (guest posts, niche edits, partnerships)

* Reverse-engineer competitor backlink profiles

* Run outreach campaigns at scale 
, partnerships, placements)



???? No spam links. No Fiverr junk. Real domains only.



---



### 2. Keyword Expansion (Money Keywords Only)



* Identify **high-intent, revenue-driving keywords**

* Expand existing blogs with **long-tail + semantic keywords**

* Build **topic clusters** across our sites

* Find **low competition, high ROI opportunities**



---



### 3. Blog & On-Page Optimization



* Optimize all existing blogs for:



  * Internal linking

  * Proper structure (H1–H3, readability)

  * Keyword placement & density

* Improve **CTR (titles, meta descriptions)**

* Turn content into **conversion-focused pages**



---



### 4. Technical SEO & Performance



* Ensure all pages are:



  * Properly indexed

  * Fast-loading

  * Structured correctly (schema, crawlability)

* Fix any issues affecting rankings



---



## ???? What We Care About (KPIs)



* Organic traffic growth

* Keyword rankings (especially high-intent terms)

* Referring domains (quality over quantity)

* Leads generated from organic traffic



???? If you don’t think in metrics, this role isn’t for you.





## ? Who This Is NOT For



* Beginners

* “Content writers who do a bit of SEO”

* Anyone relying on outdated tactics

* People who need constant hand-holding



## ? Who This IS For



* Someone who has **actually ranked sites before**

* Someone who understands **how to build authority**

* Someone who can **execute, not just advise**

* Someone who treats this like **their own project**



## ???? Working Setup



* Remote

* Flexible

* Long-term opportunity across multiple projects



## ???? Compensation



* Competitive (based on experience)

* Performance-based upside available





## ?? Read This Before Applying



If you apply, include:



1. 2–3 websites you’ve ranked

2. Keywords you ranked them for

3. How you built backlinks (be specific)



???? If you don’t include this, your application will be ignored.

title: Bookkeeper / Operations Assistant
description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE

We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented Bookkeeper / Operations Assistant to join our growing business/financial advisory firm serving clients in e-commerce, consulting and healthcare industries.

You will handle day-to-day bookkeeping tasks, AP/AR, reconciliations, financial documentation, sales/operations support, and basic HR admin.

This is a long-term, stable role with room for growth. 

Accuracy, reliability, and strong communication are essential.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Bookkeeping & Accounting

- Account Payable (invoice processing, bill paying, PO issuance, expense report, payroll)

- Communicate with vendors to request invoices, statements, or credits

- Account Receivable (invoice issuance), bank statement reconciliation

- Support quarter/year-end close: Reconciliations, Verification of transactions

- Support month-end close: Cash Flow Forecast Update, Purchase Order, Inventory tracking

- Prepare financials for audit and tax filing



Administrative & HR Support

- CRM updates (clients, prospects, leads)

- Employee onboarding (collect forms, IDs, signatures, background checks)

- Payroll Management

- Maintain employee files and documentation (personal details)

- Maintain company directories, calendars, and internal lists

- Assist with basic HR compliance tasks



Operations & Documentation

- Assist with simple logistics and supply orders

- Update and maintain SOPs and internal process documents

- Track licenses, vendor agreements, compliance certificates

- Conduct research for tools, vendors, pricing, and services

- Support special projects for Finance and Operations



QUALIFICATIONS

- Two years of Bookkeeping or AP/AR experience REQUIRED

- Certified with Quickbooks or Xero REQUIRED

- Proficient with Google Sheets, Docs, Drive; 

- Experience with AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude 

- Highly detail-oriented and organized

- Ability to solve problems and manage recurring tasks independently

- Stable internet connection + backup power plan



WORK SCHEDULE

- Full-Time or Part-time (20-40 hours/week)

- Must have availability during morning to early afternoon Asia time

- Long-term role with stable employment



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS

- Starting salary: P300-P500/hour or P50,000 to P80,000/month if full-time

- Higher offers for strong experience

- Performance-based raises

- Skill development and advancement opportunities



TO APPLY (IMPORTANT):

1. First line of your application must be: Blue Sky

2. Record a short Loom video (2–3 min) introducing yourself

3. Answer:

    * Why should I hire you?

    * Describe a time you solved a problem independently

4. Send me your gmail address and Whatsapp number

5. Applications without the above will be automatically rejected

title: Developer / Programmer / PHP / MySQL / HTML5 / CSS / JavaScript
description:
Developer / Programmer / PHP / MySQL / HTML5 / CSS / JavaScript



About Us

We’re an e-commerce team maintaining several in-house tech projects: Laravel dashboards, TypeScript frontends, Python automations, and Google Apps Script tools. Everything we build supports Amazon listings, ads, and our content pipeline. We work remotely, keep schedules flexible, and focus on practical solutions.



Role Overview

We’re hiring a programmer who can move between different codebases (Laravel/PHP, Node/TypeScript, Python, Google Apps Script) and keep our tools updated. You’ll partner with teammates across ops and creative to turn real needs into software applications, make straightforward improvements, fix bugs, and document what changed.



Key Responsibilities

- Build and improve features across Laravel/Filament, Next.js/TypeScript, Python scripts, and Apps Script utilities

- Maintain internal tools for Amazon Ads data, reporting dashboards, and creator workflows

- Refactor older PHP modules so they’re easier to maintain and properly documented

- Connect our systems to third-party APIs and keep data flowing correctly

- Communicate with non-technical teammates, gather requirements, and summarize updates

- Keep repos tidy with light tests, basic logging, and good Git hygiene



Skills We’re Looking For

- Fluent written and spoken English; able to explain technical topics plainly

- Hands-on experience with at least two of Laravel/PHP, Node/TypeScript, Python

- Comfortable with SQL and reporting-friendly data models

- Able to juggle multiple projects without losing context

- Organized and diligent about documenting work

- Uses AI coding helpers (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, etc.) responsibly



Requirements

- 4+ years of software development experience (or equivalent portfolio)

- Confident using Git, pull requests, and code reviews

- Comfortable with ClickUp, Baserow, or quick to learn similar SaaS tools

- Reliable home workstation with solid internet

- Full-time availability preferred; part-time candidates with consistent schedules considered



Nice-to-Have

- Filament customization or Laravel queue experience

- Background with Amazon Ads or ecommerce analytics

- Google Workspace scripting or Chrome automation

- Eye for clean UI implementation (Tailwind, component libraries, Figma handoff)

- Light DevOps familiarity such as Docker or simple server upkeep



Work Details

- Remote role with flexible scheduling; we care about deliverables and communication, but we don’t run graveyard shifts

- Paid twice monthly via Wise

- Work tracked in ClickUp and shared documentation; you’ll help keep notes current



How to Apply

We use a Google Form to collect applications. If the embedded form isn’t visible, use this link:



We’re looking for steady engineers who enjoy building practical tools and communicating clearly. If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.

title: SaaS Project Manager Intern (Remote)
description:
Who We Are

, London), founded in 2016 by Deepak Shukla (ex-Deloitte, TEDx speaker,

About the Role

What We’re Looking For

Good written and spoken English

Reliable internet and ability to work remotely

Interest in SaaS, tech, or startups

Self-starter attitude (you don’t wait to be told everything)



Nice to have:

Any internship, freelance, or academic project experience



We value attitude and willingness to learn more than experience.



What You’ll Get

Opportunity to grow into a full-time role

Work Environment & Culture

You’ll work with people from different countries

We value accountability and ownership

We move fast — “launch first, improve later”

Open communication and transparent systems

How to Apply
