Applications without the Loom video (or under 5 minutes) will not be reviewed. Your application is only considered complete once both steps are submitted.

title: Klaviyo Email Copywriter
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Content Marketer to own our content strategy across platforms, with a primary focus on
 marketing (Klaviyo) and website (Shopify). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelancer or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is creative, strategic, and detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with designers to improve content performance through clear insights, testing, and audience-focused messaging.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Plan, write, and execute
 campaigns and automated flows in Klaviyo.

- Create and optimize website copy, landing pages, product descriptions, and other on-site content.

- Collaborate with graphic designers to produce visuals aligned with campaigns.

- Analyze
 and website performance metrics to identify what’s working, underperforming content, and opportunities for improvement.

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve content and campaign performance.

- Provide insights and recommendations to improve messaging, tone, and overall content effectiveness.

- Analyze website behavior and implement content-driven CRO strategies to improve conversions on landing pages, product pages, and key funnels.

- Monitor competitors’
s, websites, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC content marketing trends and
 best practices.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong writing, editing, and storytelling skills

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret content performance data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain insights to non-technical teammates

- Organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently



Nice To Have (but not required)

- Experience with Klaviyo or other
 marketing platforms

- Experience with Shopify or website analytics

- Experience in content marketing or CRM/CRO for DTC brands

- Familiarity with user behavior analytics, heatmaps, or funnel optimization



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Klaviyo
 Copywriter – (Your Name)". Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Describe your last job: your job overview, and how long did you work there?

2) What challenge did you face, and why did you leave the job?

3) Give us one (or more) metric you owned most directly, what it was when you started, and what it was after you left.

4) Tell us one (or more) initiative you took at work that was not requested by your employer, but purely your own call.

5) Our
 program is underperforming: flows and campaigns are not converting, and we are facing deliverability issues. Assume you're starting from scratch with a list that has gone cold. Devise a 90-day game plan. What do you do first, in what order, and why that sequence? What are the things most people get wrong when trying to revive a dead list, and what would you not do in the first 30 days?

6) What's the latest skill you self-learned? Why did you upskill on it and how are you using it now? 

7) Attach your resume & portfolio.



We are looking for your thinking process and specific experience. Overly polished or generic answers with no specific numbers or personal details will be disqualified.

title: High-Earning Telesales Closer | Up to $3,000/month | US E-commerce Brand
description:
TELESALES REPRESENTATIVE - US E-COMMERCE BRAND



Remote Philippines | Full-time | Night Shift (US Hours)





ABOUT THE ROLE



A fast-growing US e-commerce brand specializing in premium products for US business customers is hiring 2 to 3 Telesales Representatives in the Philippines to handle warm leads and close deals over the phone.



This is a pure sales role, not customer support, not inbound call center. We are looking for people with native-like English, persistent follow-up discipline, and the ability to close deals.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



- Receive a daily list of warm leads, customers who have shown buying intent on our website

- Call leads within 10 to 30 minutes of receipt, uncover needs and handle objections

- Close deals over the phone or clearly identify what follow-up is needed

- Send personalized SMS and
s through our internal CRM

- Pursue each lead 6 to 8 times across multiple channels until they buy or clearly opt out

- Maintain detailed records of every customer interaction in the CRM

- Hit monthly sales KPIs





REQUIRED



- 3 to 5 years of telesales experience, preferably with US customers

- Native-like or near-native English with strong American accent preferred. Our customers are US small business owners and they will hear the difference. Natural and clear is required.

- Proven closer mentality, you measure success by deals closed not calls made

- Persistent and disciplined, you follow up 6, 7, 8 times without giving up

- Comfortable with consultative selling, our customers spend 1,000 USD plus and need guidance not pressure

- Self-disciplined remote worker with reliable home office setup, fast internet minimum 25 Mbps, and quiet environment

- CRM-savvy, quick learner with internal sales tools, can update notes during and after calls

- Comfortable with workplace tools such as Slack, Google Workspace, Zoom, OpenPhone, or similar VoIP

- Full-time exclusive commitment. You cannot work for another company simultaneously while employed with us.





PREFERRED



- E-commerce or DTC sales background

- Experience selling visual or design products such as signage, print, branding

- Experience working with creative entrepreneurs or restaurant and retail SMB owners





NOT A FIT IF



- You prefer customer support or inbound-only roles

- You are uncomfortable with commission-heavy compensation

- You give up on leads after 1 or 2 unsuccessful calls

- You cannot sustain a night shift schedule from 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time

- You see "no" as failure instead of feedback

- You plan to work multiple jobs or freelance projects on the side





COMPENSATION STRUCTURE



Base Salary



- Fixed monthly base: 610 USD to 750 USD per month, depending on experience and audio screening result

- Base is paid regardless of monthly performance, on time every month



2-Month Probation



- Reduced base salary at 80 percent of full base

- Commission at 100 percent, same as full-time, earn full commission on every deal closed from day one

- Probation goal is to master the product, sales script, and follow-up process



After Probation, from Month 3



- Full base salary, 610 USD to 750 USD per month

- Plus uncapped commission on closed revenue





REALISTIC INCOME EXPECTATIONS



- Hard workers who put in full hours and call volume earn minimum 1,500 USD per month, base plus commission

- KPI achievers earn 2,000 USD plus per month

- Top performers exceeding KPI earn 3,000 USD plus per month, with no cap



Commission structure is simple: the more deals you close, the more you earn, with no ceiling.





EXCLUSIVITY POLICY



This is a full-time exclusive role. You are not allowed to work for another company, do freelance sales work, or take other employment simultaneously while employed with us.



If discovered working another job:



- Immediate termination of employment

- Forfeiture of any unpaid commission earned to date

- Forfeiture of any pending bonuses or revenue share



We invest heavily in our SDRs through training, leads, and tools. We expect 100 percent of your work hours dedicated to our team.





LONG-TERM OPPORTUNITIES FOR TOP PERFORMERS



- Performance-based revenue share program for outstanding contributors

- Career path: Telesales to Senior Closer to Team Lead to Sales Director





WORK SCHEDULE



- Monday to Friday: 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time, equivalent to 9 AM to 6 PM US Eastern Time, full 9-hour shift

- Saturday: 9 PM to 1 AM Manila time, equivalent to 9 AM to 1 PM US Eastern Time, 4-hour half shift

- Total around 49 hours per week across 6 days



DAYS OFF



- Sundays every week

- Major US holidays such as Memorial Day, July 4, Labor Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year

- Major Philippine holidays





WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Warm leads daily, no cold calling, no list scraping

- Comprehensive sales playbook with proven scripts, objection handling, FAQ

- One-week paid training before you take customer calls

- Internal CRM with full lead context, mockup design, quote, customer history

- OpenPhone account with US phone number

- Dedicated Team Lead for daily coaching and support

- Clear performance metrics





APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To apply, please follow ALL these steps. Applications missing any step will be ignored.



1. SEND YOUR RESUME



Highlight relevant sales experience, specifically US customer experience, average deal size closed, and conversion rates if available.



2. RECORD AN AUDIO FILE, MINIMUM 2 MINUTES



Record yourself handling this scenario:



You are calling a customer named John who designed a 580 USD custom product on our website about 30 minutes ago, but has not placed the order yet. Record yourself making this discovery call. Your goal is to understand what is holding him back and offer a solution. You can pause briefly between turns to indicate John is responding.



We are listening for: accent, tone, pacing, discovery skills, objection handling, and natural conversation flow.



3. ANSWER THESE 4 SHORT QUESTIONS



- Describe the highest-value deal you have closed and how you closed it. How many follow-up attempts did it take?

- Why are you applying for this role specifically, not just any sales job?

- When can you start? Are you available for night shift, 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time, Mon-Sat?

- Are you currently working another job? Can you commit to full-time exclusivity with us?



4. CONFIRM YOU UNDERSTAND



- This is a commission-heavy sales role, not customer service

- Working hours are 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time, Mon-Fri full shift, Saturday half shift 9 PM to 1 AM

- This is a full-time exclusive role, no second jobs allowed

- You will be expected to follow up 6 to 8 times per lead, not give up after 1 or 2 calls

- The audio recording is the most important part of your application





HIRING PROCESS



We move fast for the right candidates:



- Step 1: Resume and audio screen, 2 to 3 days

- Step 2: 30-minute interview with our Team Lead via Zoom

- Step 3: Live mock call exercise with a hiring manager

- Step 4: Final interview and offer



Start date: ASAP



We are hiring 2 to 3 SDRs in this batch. Strong candidates will receive offers quickly.





WHY JOIN US



- Warm leads only, your time goes to closing not prospecting

- Real product, real demand, premium products with proven market fit

- Direct access to founders, no corporate bureaucracy

- Performance-based revenue share for top performers, your income scales with company growth

- Long-term career path: SDR to Senior SDR to Team Lead to Sales Director

- Build a remote sales career with a US e-commerce brand at scale





Apply now if you are a closer who is tired of low-ticket sales and ready to follow up until you earn what you are worth.

title: Quick Hire for VA Call Handling
description:
Important: Our application process moves very quickly. If you are selected for the next rounds of interviews, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist. This role consists of handling inbound calls, booking appointments, and completing various administrative tasks. This is a long-term, performance-based position. All calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



For candidates who may be a stronger fit outside of a voice-based role, we also offer non-voice positions with a heavier focus on administrative tasks, subject to availability and overall fit.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them in your reply, and answer each one thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?

(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Facebook Ads Specialist (100% Remote / Work From Anywhere)

What We Offer

title: Full-Stack Web Developer & Technical Designer
description:
We are a high-growth telehealth practice specializing in addiction care, chronic disease management, and wellness. We are expanding nationally and need a technical powerhouse to lead our digital infrastructure. We need a Senior Full-Stack Web Developer  who can bridge the gap between advanced design and expert-level coding. You will own the technical integrity of our platform, ensuring it is secure, lightning-fast, and authoritative for AI search engines.



Who we are looking for:

We are NOT looking for a "plugin installer" or someone who only uses templates. We need a "Builder", someone who has deep coding experience and can design custom, high-performance web environments. You will be responsible for the technical speed, security, and advanced design of our website.



Key Responsibilities:



Advanced Custom Development: Move beyond standard themes to build custom, high-converting features using PHP, JavaScript, and advanced WordPress frameworks.



Technical SEO & Architecture: Resolve the current "Supportive Steps" content duplication issues through better site architecture (e.g., dynamic content blocks or canonical mapping).  



Performance Optimization: Implement advanced caching, CDN strategies, and script minification to ensure sub-second load times for patients in rural areas with limited connectivity.



HIPAA-Secure Architecture: Work with our Strategic Lead to ensure all patient-facing forms, APIs, and integrations meet strict HIPAA and YMYL security standards.



GEO Infrastructure: Implement custom schema markup (MedicalOrganization, Physician, FAQPage) to ensure our company is cited as a source of truth by AI engines like ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, AND other LLM models



Requirements:



5+ years of professional full-stack development experience (PHP, JavaScript, HTML5/CSS3). Will consider less experience based on job experience and prior roles. 



Proven track record building high-performance healthcare or enterprise sites.



Experience with advanced WordPress customization and API integrations.



Deep understanding of Technical SEO, Core Web Vitals, and mobile-first indexing.



Requirement: You must have experience with advanced coding (JavaScript/PHP) and custom design (Figma to WordPress).



Mandatory Screening Question (Include in your application):

How would you optimize a telehealth site specifically for users in rural areas with low-bandwidth internet connections? Please describe the technical steps you would take.

title: eBay Virtual Assistant – Amazon UK to eBay UK Dropshipping
description:
About the Role

We run a New UK-based eBay dropshipping store sourcing products exclusively from Amazon UK. We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented VA with hands-on Amazon to eBay UK dropshipping experience. This is a part-time role at 15 hours per week, paid at a fixed rate of $300/month. Hours are flexible and can be agreed to suit both parties. This is a long-term role with the opportunity to grow hours over time for the right person.

What You'll Be Doing

• Finding profitable products on Amazon UK with strong demand and healthy margins on eBay UK

• Checking Amazon UK pricing, availability, and Prime eligibility before listing

• Calculating profit after eBay UK fees (approx. 12.8%), payment processing fees, and any other costs

• Writing keyword-rich eBay UK titles (up to 80 characters)

• Writing clear, buyer-focused item descriptions optimised for eBay UK

• Selecting accurate eBay UK categories and completing all item specifics

• Monitoring live listings for Amazon UK price or stock changes

• Identifying trending, seasonal, or high-demand product opportunities

What We're Looking For

• Proven experience with Amazon UK to eBay UK dropshipping (not just general eBay work)

• Understanding of eBay UK's fee structure and how to calculate profit margins accurately

• Experience with product research tools such as Terapeak, ZIK Analytics, or AutoDS

• Knowledge of eBay's VeRO policy and how to avoid restricted or branded products

• Strong written English for title and description writing

• Reliable internet connection and your own device

• Self-motivated and able to work independently with minimal supervision

Nice to Have

• Experience with dropshipping tools (AutoDS, DSM Tool, Hustle Got Real)

• Experience with repricing or stock monitoring tools

• Familiarity with eBay UK selling limits and account health metrics

The Details

• Hours: 15 hours per week (flexible, to be agreed)

• Rate: $300/month fixed — paid via Wise or PayPal

• Long-term role with opportunity to increase hours based on performance

To Apply, Please Tell Us

8. Your specific experience with Amazon UK to eBay UK dropshipping

9. Which product research and dropshipping tools you have used

10. A rough example of a product you sourced and listed, including the margin

11. Your availability and preferred working hours

12. Confirmation that you are happy with the $300/month rate for 15 hours per week

title: Executive Assistant (Operations | Real Estate | Night Shift)
description:
AP Required to Apply: 10+ (the more points you have, the more serious we know you are. Anything less than 10 AP will be archived immediately and not looked at)



This is not a traditional Executive Assistant role.



This is a high leverage role supporting a fast-moving real estate CEO who values precision, ownership, and speed.



If you need hand-holding, constant reassurance, or loose expectations—this is not for you.



This role is best suited for someone who prefers structure, ownership, and high standards over comfort or flexibility.



If you take pride in anticipating needs, protecting time, and executing cleanly—keep reading.



-



Location: Remote / Virtual

Schedule (PHT): Tuesday–Saturday | Start Time 09:30 PM (1-hour unpaid break)

Schedule (CST): Monday–Friday | Start Time 8:30 AM (1-hour unpaid break)

Compensation: $1,695/USD per month + (based on experience and performance)

Type: Full-Time Salary includes 13th month pay (prorated) 

-



About ZenHomes



ZenHomes is a lean, high-performing real estate company based in Texas. We acquire off-market properties, manage rentals, and operate with clarity, accountability, and systems.



We run a small, trusted team across the U.S. and the Philippines. We don’t do busywork. We don’t micromanage. We care about outcomes.



-



About This Role (Read Carefully)



This is a high-expectation Executive Assistant role supporting the CEO directly.



Even though the position is remote, expectations are real from Day 1: speed, accuracy, follow-through, and emotional maturity.



This role exists to:

 • Buy back the CEO’s time immediately 

 • Reduce noise, errors, and dropped details

 • Execute quickly within clear guidelines

 • Improve rapidly through direct feedback



Feedback here is direct and timely because standards are high. The goal is improvement, not perfection—but repeated mistakes signal misalignment.



If something is unclear, elite operators pause and ask first. Once clarified, execution must be fast and precise.



Autonomy is earned quickly through judgment, correction speed, and consistency.



-



What You’ll Own



Immediate Responsibilities (Day 1 Standard)



Calendar & Time Protection

 • Own and manage the CEO’s calendar daily +1 week out

 • Book, reschedule, and confirm events/meetings

 • Enforce calendar rules with discipline

 • Prepare daily sync agenda's and context so nothing is reactive



Communication & Coordination

 • Triage incoming messages and requests

 • Draft clear, professional responses in the CEO’s voice

 • Flag decisions cleanly with relevant context

 • Coordinate logistics, scheduling, reminders, and next steps



Task Tracking & Execution

 • Track tasks and open loops in Asana

 • Ensure nothing drops, stalls, or surprises the CEO

 • Prepare before asking questions

 • Execute once aligned—fast and clean

 • Create workflows of repeating tasks

-



Earned Responsibilities (After Trust Is Demonstrated)

 • Handle tenant, guest, and vendor coordination with minimal escalation

 • Surface risks, conflicts, or gaps before they become problems

 • Reduce unnecessary interruptions and “quick questions”

 • Act as a true gatekeeper of the CEO’s time



-



Required Experience & Traits

 • 2+ years as an Executive Assistant, Operations Assistant, or similar

 • Excellent written and spoken English (neutral accent required)

 • Must be AI forward thinking 

 • Highly organized, responsive, and detail-oriented

 • Comfortable in fast-paced, high-expectation environments

 • Emotionally steady and receptive to direct feedback

 • Loyal, discreet, and dependable





-



You Will Thrive Here If You:

 • Think in systems, workflows and outcomes

 • Use AI to support systems, workflows, and outcomes

 • Take responsibility personally

 • Dislike chaos and proactively fix it by immediately building systems so it never happens again

 • Ask smart questions after attempting solutions

 • Prefer clear feedback over vague praise

 • Stay calm under pressure and don’t personalize corrections



This Role Is Not for You If You:

 • If you have ever missed a deadline, payment, or critical
 due to disorganization or oversight, this role will not be a fit. This role requires zero tolerance for missed financial or operational items.

 • Need constant reassurance or validation

 • Guess instead of asking when unclear

 • Take feedback personally

 • Avoid accountability

 • Prefer slow, low-pressure environments



-



What Success Looks Like

 • The CEO’s calendar is accurate, structured, and protected

 • Inbox = Zero Daily (for critical items)   

 • Tasks are handled without reminders

 • Errors are corrected quickly by creating systems and workflows and do not repeat

 • Communication is short, concise, and proactive

 • Trust compounds and responsibility expands rapidly



-



Why This Role Is Different

 • You get a front-row seat to how a real estate investment business is built and scaled

 • Strong performance leads to expanded responsibility, trust, and compensation

 • This is a long-term role for someone who wants to grow with a CEO—not hop jobs



-



Tools We Use

 • Google Workpace (Gmail, Calendar, Google Sheets, Google Docs) 

 • Asana

 • Slack

 • ChatGPT Pro (not provided but at least ChatGPT Go is required for this role) 

 • Airbnb / VRBO / Hospitable

 • REsimpli CRM

 • NordVPN (provided)



-



Non-Negotiable Setup Requirements

 • Quiet, separate, dedicated home office

 • Two monitors with an external mouse & keyboard

 • Noise-canceling Bluetooth headset

 • Hardwired internet (minimum 300 Mbps download & upload speed)

 • Backup internet and backup power



Paid Time Off (PTO) 



After completing 90 days of employment, you will begin accruing paid time off equivalent to 10 days per year, accrued monthly starting on Day 91 (approximately 0.83 day per month).

-



Application Process (Follow Exactly or Your Application Will Not Be Reviewed)



Step 1: Attach your resume via Google Drive



Step 2: Record a Loom video and share the link answering:

 1. Why this role excites you

 2. A time you protected a leader’s time under pressure

 3. A mistake you made—and how you ensured it never happened again

 4. How you handled direct feedback

 5. Include the word “Control” in your Loom video.



Step 3:

 • Screenshot from Speedtest.net via Google Drive

 • Photo of your current home office setup via Google Drive



-



Trial Period



All hires begin with a 30-day paid trial period. Expect daily check-ins, real responsibility, and fast feedback. 



Repeated mistakes without system improvement will result in immediate termination.



We hire based on performance, correction speed, judgment, and character.

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
About Us

Structure Flows is a service that provides
 advertising infrastructure to media buyers and agencies. We supply things like Business Managers, ad accounts, profiles, and Pages to clients who need reliable setups for their advertising operations. All of our client communication and delivery happens through 
, and we track everything internally through a dashboard. We're growing steadily and we need an extra pair of hands to help us keep up with client requests and day-to-day support.



The Role

We're not looking for a
 expert here. What we need is someone who is fast, reliable, and genuinely dedicated to keeping clients happy. Most of what you'll be doing is straightforward — responding to client messages in our 
 server, helping them with basic questions, passing along deliveries, and making sure everything gets logged properly in our system. The work itself isn't complicated, but it does require you to be on top of things. When a client reaches out, they need a response quickly, not hours later. That's the single most important thing in this role: fast reaction times and consistent availability.

You'll be trained on how our processes work and what our products are, so you don't need to come in already knowing the ins and outs of
 infrastructure. What you do need is the kind of attitude where you take ownership of your responsibilities, pay attention to details, and don't let things slip through the cracks. If you're someone who checks in regularly, responds promptly, and takes pride in doing even simple tasks well, you're exactly who we're looking for.

This is a daily role that requires your attention seven days a week. On most days the workload will be somewhere between two and four hours, though some days will be lighter depending on how busy things are. It's not a traditional nine-to-five job, but it does require you to be consistently present and responsive throughout the day. Clients don't stop reaching out on weekends, so neither can we.



What We're Looking For

Above all else, we need someone who reacts fast and shows up every day. Speed and dedication are what matter most in this role. You should be comfortable communicating in clear, professional English, since everything happens in writing through 
.

You do need to have at least basic working experience with 
, Google Sheets, and ClickUp. These are tools we use every single day. 
 is where all client communication happens, Google Sheets is how we track orders and inventory, and ClickUp is how we manage tasks and keep everything organized internally. You don't need to be a power user in any of them, but you should be able to jump in and navigate them without needing to learn what they are from scratch.

Being organized and keeping track of multiple conversations and tasks at the same time is part of the job, so a natural sense of structure helps a lot.



How to Apply

We want to see two things from you.

First, write us a short motivation letter explaining why you're interested in this role and what makes you a reliable person to have on a team. We don't need anything formal or fancy, just be honest about who you are and how you work. Tell us about your availability, how quickly you typically respond to messages, and why a daily commitment like this fits your lifestyle.

Second, include your resume and any relevant work experience. Also include the word strawberry in the first sentence of your resume to show that you actually read the whole application. If you've done customer support, community management, virtual assistance, or anything else where fast communication and consistency were key, make sure to highlight that.

Applications that don't include both of these will not be reviewed. We're looking for someone dependable who actually wants to be part of a growing operation, so if that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.

title: E-commerce & Shopify Specialist (Virtual Assistant)
description:

Strong understanding of DTC conversion optimization, CRO, UX, site speed

Able to think strategically and communicate recommendations clearly to non-technical stakeholders

Experience with Meta/Facebook ad integrations and pixel setup is a strong plus

Self-directed with the ability to audit, plan, and execute with minimal hand-holding



Skills

Shopify

CRO

UX optimization

Meta Ads

DTC e-commerce

Site audit



Rate: $1,200/month

Important:

title: 12 HR Decision | VA Remote Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves very quickly. If you are selected for the next rounds of interviews, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist. This role consists of handling inbound calls, booking appointments, and completing various administrative tasks. This is a long-term, performance-based position. All calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



For candidates who may be a stronger fit outside of a voice-based role, we also offer non-voice positions with a heavier focus on administrative tasks, subject to availability and overall fit.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Clinical Writer (nurse, MA, other) & High-Level WordPress Specialist
description:
We are a  a high-growth, physician-led telehealth practice. We operate in complex clinical spaces (Suboxone, PrEP/PEP, HIV) and public health initiatives. We need a professional who can produce elite-level medical content and build it into a high-performance WordPress environment.



Clinical & Academic Background: A degree in Nursing (BSN), Public Health, or a related clinical field is required. Candidates must demonstrate a collegiate/professional level of literacy, with the ability to synthesize complex medical data and public health policy into authoritative, high-level prose (proof of education is required). 



You will be an the architect of our digital authority under guidance of our clinical team. You will take clinical briefs and public health data and transform them into visually stunning, technically advanced, and SEO-optimized web pages that position our national practice as the primary authority nationally.  



High-Level Technical WordPress Requirements:



Technical SEO & Schema: Deep knowledge of MedicalEntity, FAQ, and Article Schema to ensure our content is cited by AI tools (ChatGPT/Perplexity).



You will be responsible for working with our SEO marketing and design team for full execution: WordPress Design ? GoHighLevel Workflow Integration ? Google Business Profile Posting.



Performance: Knowledge of WebP optimization, CSS minification, and maintaining elite Core Web Vitals.



Clinical & Public Health Requirements:



Ability to write clinical and public health content 



Deep familiarity with PrEP, PEP, HIV care, and US healthcare regulations CDC and other authoratative organizations



Mastery of E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness).



Mandatory Screening Questions (Must complete both to be considered):

Question 1: Technical Execution

"Walk us through your technical process for ensuring a clinical blog post is 'Answer-Forward' for AI engines. Which specific Schema types do you use, and how do you structure your HTML headers to win the Featured Snippet?"



Question 2: The E-E-A-T Writing Test

"Below, please submit a two-paragraph writing sample for a blog post titled: 'The Impact of Rural Healthcare Access on PrEP Adherence in the Southern US.' Your sample must:



Utilize and cite at least two high-authority resources (e.g., CDC, HRSA, or NIH).



Demonstrate 'Medical E-E-A-T' by using precise clinical and administrative terminology.



Include a brief explanation of which 2 external 'backlinks' you would choose to strengthen this article's authority and why."

title: Lead Research & Outreach Specialist (Remote) – Entertainment Industry

Assist with light website updates if needed

title: Junior Accountant - US Client Facing
description:
Salary: $400 - $650 USD per month

Job Type: Full-Time (48 hours/week)

Shift: US Business Hours (EST/PST) (Night Shift in PH)



We are committed to building a team as diverse as the community we serve. We especially welcome applications from women and underrepresented groups



About the Role

We are a US-based firm looking for a vibrant, professional Junior Accountant to be the "face" of our daily operations. If you are a recent graduate who is tech-savvy, loves QuickBooks Online, and enjoys interacting with people on camera, this is the perfect entry-level role for you!



This isn't your typical "back-office" accounting job. You will be helping US business owners keep their books clean while serving as a professional representative of our brand.



What You’ll Do

QBO Management: Handle daily categorization, bank reconciliations, and data entry within QuickBooks Online.



Client Success: Host brief Google Meet check-ins with clients to request missing documents or clarify transactions.



Professional Reporting: Generate and present basic P&L and Balance Sheet reports.  



Collaboration: Support our Senior CPA in preparing for month-end close.



What We’re Looking For

Education: Recent graduate . Freshers are encouraged to apply!



QuickBooks Skills: Familiarity with QuickBooks Online (QBO). ProAdvisor certification is a huge plus.



"Camera-Ready" Presence: You must be comfortable on video calls and present yourself with a high degree of professionalism and energy.



Communication: Flawless verbal and written English is a must-have for our US-based clients.



Tech Kit: You have a reliable home office setup (high-speed internet, noise-cancelling headset, and power backup) and are comfortable working US business hours (EST/PST).



Why You’ll Love It

Deep-dive training in US accounting practices.



Work in a fun, modern company culture that values communication.



Competitive starting pay with quarterly performance reviews.



How to Apply

To be considered, please send your application with the subject line: "Junior Accountant Rockstar - [Your Name]".



Attach your resume (PDF).



REQUIRED: Include a 120-second video introduction (via Loom) telling us about your accounting background and why you enjoy working with clients. We will not review applications without a video intro.

title: Customer Support Specialist | US Tech Startup (Full-Time, Long-Term People Only)
description:
Fast-Growing Tech Moving Platform: Moving Muscle



Company: Moving Muscle, a fast-growing labor-only moving platform based in the United States. We are innovating the traditional moving industry by providing reliable, transparent moving labor to customers booking rental trucks and containers.



About the Role

We are hiring a Customer Support Specialist to handle inbound & outbound calls, SMS, live ticketing, job dispatch, and administrative data entry. You will be the front line ensuring our customers and movers get the right help at the right time. Having experience in local home service industry is vital for this role.



This role requires top-tier English, strong technical skills, professional phone presence, and proven customer support experience. We are only looking for serious professionals with a quiet workspace, excellent internet, and the right hardware to handle a demanding software stack.



Key Responsibilities

• Answer inbound calls with professionalism and empathy.

• Make outbound calls to customers and movers as needed for updates, confirmations, or issue resolution.

• Respond quickly to SMS and ticket inquiries using Front (similar to Zendesk/Freshdesk).

• Dispatch movers to jobs in real-time, ensuring scheduling accuracy and customer satisfaction.

• Update and maintain internal systems (Notion for team organization, Slack for communication, Google Sheets for tracking).

• Document issues clearly for management and escalate when necessary.

• Uphold high standards of accuracy, professionalism, and customer care.



**Required Skills & Experience (NON-NEGOTIABLE)**

• 3+ years in customer support / BPO / call center handling phone + ticket systems.

• Excellent spoken & written English. Neutral or near-neutral accent is required.

• Strong multitasking: handle calls, SMS, and tickets simultaneously.

• Experience with ticketing software (Front, Zendesk, or Freshdesk).

• Experience with VoIP calling systems (Aircall, RingCentral, Dialpad, etc.).

• Tech-savvy and comfortable with multiple SaaS platforms (Slack, Notion, Google Workspace).

• Quiet, professional home office setup: noise-canceling headset, reliable high-speed internet, backup plan for power/internet outages.

• Proven track record of reliability (we will check references and work history).



Tip: If you are very experienced with Notion, reference this at the top of your application



Work Environment & Equipment Requirements

• High-speed wired internet (minimum 25 Mbps download / 10 Mbps upload).

• Backup connection or contingency plan (must be explained in application).

• Fast, modern computer capable of running multiple SaaS apps simultaneously.

• Professional noise-canceling headset.

• Quiet, distraction-free workspace for clear calls.



Operating Hours:

8AM - 8PM Eastern Standard Time (US)



Please submit in your application if you are flexible on which shift hours or if there are strong preferences.



Compensation

$7.50 USD / hour ($225 per week, full-time, paid weekly)



Starting rate: $7.50/hr. We conduct performance reviews every quarter. Based on quality, consistency, and initiative, pay will increase over time based on contributions. We are seeking someone for the long-run who will be able to adjust roles over time and grow with us.



- Long-term role with growth potential for top performers.

- Training provided on company workflows; you are expected to already be very strong in core support skills and software.



Application Instructions:

To apply, you must follow these steps. Applications missing any step will not be considered.



1. Subject Line: Start your application header with the phrase:

“Strong Support Muscle” (this shows you pay attention to detail)



2. Loom Video (mandatory, under 5 minutes): Answer the following 3 questions in English. (No other formats accepted; Loom only.)

• Q1: Which industry do you have experience in as a customer support specialist role?

• Q2: What excites you the most about tech? What tools do you most use? What AI do you use?

• Q3: Quickly walk us through your home office setup (internet speed, backup plan, computer, headset, and workspace).



Why This Role:



This is NOT a “starter job.” This is a premium support role for someone who takes pride in delivering excellent service, can think independently, and wants to be part of a growing US startup revolutionizing the moving industry. If you are reliable, professional, and committed, you will be treated as a valued long-term partner.
